expectations.text: Advisory block fires for the vague 'fix this' prompt
expectations.evidence: hook_output.md contains '⚡ lqc-tokens advisory' header with vague-prompt advisory

expectations.text: Advisory identifies vague intent as the anti-pattern (not data-heaviness or token count)
expectations.evidence: '• Vague prompt detected ("fix this" with no specific intent)' — correctly identified as Check 2 anti-pattern, not Check 1 or 3

expectations.text: Advisory suggests optimize-prompt skill or asks for clarification
expectations.evidence: Advisory: '— /lqc-tokens:optimize-prompt can help clarify your request'
